name: Pipedrive
tagline: Sales CRM built by salespeople, for salespeople
description: Pipedrive is a sales-focused CRM designed to give sales teams clear visibility over their pipeline. Known for its intuitive drag-and-drop interface, activity-based selling methodology, and strong automation features.
use_cases: Your sales team wants a visual drag-and-drop pipeline that gives instant clarity on which deals to chase and what activity is overdue
You're a small to mid-size sales team that finds Salesforce overwhelming but needs more than a basic spreadsheet CRM
You want activity-based selling with automatic reminders so reps never miss a follow-up call or email
Your reps are frequently on the road and need a strong mobile CRM app to log calls and update deals from their phone
